name: Caprese-style Pasta Salad
method: Cook pasta as directed on package. When cooked through but al dente, remove from heat, drain and rinse.
Combine pesto, vinegar, and olive oil in a small cup.
Place tomatoes, mozzarella, spring onions and cooled pasta in a salad bowl. Next, season with the salt and pepper.
Then, add the pesto mixture and toss to combine and serve.
Do you want to impress family and friends with a delicious, healthy, easy dinner that they will love? This
Mediterranean Chicken and Pasta Salad will do just that. If you like chicken, vegetables, or pasta salad, then give
this one a try. You'll love the combination of flavors and textures found in this tasty meal.
